lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਗਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: mil satigur sabh dukh geaa har sukh vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, all my sufferings have ended, and the Peace of the Lord has come to dwell within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੀਆ ਏਕਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar jot pragaaseea ekas siau liv laae |
lines.english: The Divine Light illuminates my inner being, and I am lovingly absorbed in the One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਮੁਖੁ ਊਜਲਾ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mil saadhoo mukh aoojalaa poorab likhiaa paae |
lines.english: Meeting with the Holy Saint, my face is radiant; I have realized my pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man gurasabadee sukh hoe |
lines.english: O my mind, you shall find peace through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਨਿਤ ਗਾਵਣੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gun govind nit gaavane niramal saachai naae |1|
lines.english: I constantly sing the Glories of the Lord of the Universe. Through the True Name, I have become spotlessly pure. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਾਇ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore kee chaakaree birathaa jaae na koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Working for the Perfect Guru, no one goes away empty-handed. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀਆ ਇਛਾਂ ਪੂਰੀਆ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: man keea ichhaan pooreea paaeaa naam nidhaan |
lines.english: The desires of the mind are fulfilled, when the Treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਸਦਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਕਰਣੈਹਾਰੁ ਪਛਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: antarajaamee sadaa sang karanaihaar pachhaan |
lines.english: The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, is always with you; recognize Him as the Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮੁਖੁ ਊਜਲਾ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee mukh aoojalaa jap naam daan isanaan |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, your face shall be radiant. Chanting the Naam, you shall receive the benefits of giving charity and taking cleansing baths.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਇਆ ਲਾਹਾ ਲਾਭੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਏ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: paaeaa laahaa laabh naam pooran hoe kaam |
lines.english: The Profit of the Naam is obtained, and all affairs are brought to fruition.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਬਿਨਸਿਆ ਤਜਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh binasiaa tajiaa sabh abhimaan |2|
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger and greed are eliminated, and all egotistical pride is abandoned. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਮੇਲਿਆ ਦੀਆ ਅਪਣਾ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh meliaa deea apanaa naam |
lines.english: In His Mercy, God unites us with Himself, and He blesses us with the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਰਹਿ ਗਇਆ ਆਪਿ ਹੋਆ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa reh geaa aap hoaa miharavaan |
lines.english: My comings and goings in reincarnation have come to an end; He Himself has bestowed His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਉ ਰਾਖਦਾ ਆਪਣੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaa kau raakhadaa aapanee kirapaa dhaar |
lines.english: His humble devotees are protected and saved; He Himself showers His Blessings upon us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਘਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sach mehal ghar paaeaa gur kaa sabad pachhaan |3|
lines.english: I have obtained my home in the True Mansion of His Presence, realizing the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤਿ ਪਲਤਿ ਮੁਖ ਊਜਲੇ ਸਾਚੇ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: halat palat mukh aoojale saache ke gun saar |
lines.english: In this world and in the world hereafter, radiant are the faces of those who cherish and enshrine the Glories of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਦੇ ਰਤੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar gun saarade rate rang apaar |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, they lovingly dwell upon His Glories; they are imbued with His Infinite Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਬਦੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: pooraa satigur je milai paaeeai sabad nidhaan |
lines.english: If we meet the Perfect True Guru, we obtain the Treasure of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰ ॥੪॥੧੧॥੮੧॥
lines.translit: paarabraham sukh saagaro naanak sad balihaar |4|11|81|
lines.english: Nanak is forever a sacrifice to the Supreme Lord God, the Ocean of Peace. ||4||11||81||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਾਟੀਐ ਲਾਗੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: janam maran dukh kaatteeai laagai sehaj dhiaan |1|
lines.english: The pains of birth and death are taken away; we are intuitively centered on His Meditation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਪਣੀ ਜਪੀਐ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh aapanee japeeai amrit naam |
lines.english: Please grant Your Grace, God, that we may meditate on Your Ambrosial Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਏਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har bin doojaa ko nahee eko naam dhiaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Lord, there is no other at all. Meditate on the One and only Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man prabh saranaaee paae |
lines.english: O my mind, seek the Sanctuary of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਮਿਲੁ ਸੰਗਤੀ ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਿਸਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee mil sangatee sachaa sabad visaahu |
lines.english: O most fortunate ones, join the Sangat, the Blessed Congregation; purchase the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈਐ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਗੁਣੀ ਅਥਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: keemat kehan na jaaeeai saagar gunee athaahu |
lines.english: His Value cannot be estimated; He is the Vast Ocean of Excellence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਕਾ ਆਸਰਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal kaa aasaraa doojaa naahee tthaau |
lines.english: I take the Support of the Lord's Lotus Feet; there is no other place of rest for me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਾਹਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kar sevaa sukh saagarai sir saahaa paatisaahu |2|
lines.english: Serve the Lord, the Ocean of Peace, the Supreme Lord over kings and emperors. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਮਾਣਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਾਣੁ ਤੂੰ ਤੇਰੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: nimaaniaa prabh maan toon terai sang samaau |3|
lines.english: O God, You are the Honor of the dishonored. I seek to merge with You. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਧਰ ਤੇਰੀ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਤੇਰੈ ਤਾਣਿ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mai dhar teree paarabraham terai taan rahaau |
lines.english: I lean upon You as my Support, O Supreme Lord God. I exist only by Your Power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਆਰਾਧੀਐ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: har japeeai aaraadheeai aatth pehar govind |
lines.english: Chant the Lord's Name and contemplate the Lord of the World, twenty-four hours a day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਗਲੇ ਦੋਖ ਉਤਾਰਿਅਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਬਖਸਿੰਦੁ ॥੪॥੧੨॥੮੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sagale dokh utaarian prabh paarabraham bakhasind |4|12|82|
lines.english: O Nanak, all pain has been washed away, by the Supreme Lord God, the Forgiver. ||4||12||82||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਰਖੇ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਰਾਖੀ ਜਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeea praan tan dhan rakhe kar kirapaa raakhee jind |
lines.english: He preserves our soul, our breath of life, body and wealth. By His Grace, He protects our soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਚ ਸਿਉ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: preet lagee tis sach siau marai na aavai jaae |
lines.english: I have fallen in love with the True Lord. He does not die, He does not come and go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਰਦ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨਾ ਸੇਵਕ ਕੈ ਸਤ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: deen darad dukh bhanjanaa sevak kai sat bhaae |
lines.english: He is the Destroyer of the pain and suffering of the meek. He bears True Love for His servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਵੇਛੋੜਿਆ ਵਿਛੁੜੈ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naa vechhorriaa vichhurrai sabh meh rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: In separation, He is not separated from us; He is pervading and permeating amongst all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਮੀਤੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re meet karahu prabh soe |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, make God your Friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਰਜ ਰੂਪੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੋ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੇਲਾਇਆ ਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: acharaj roop niranjano gur melaaeaa maae |1|
lines.english: Wondrous is the Form of the Immaculate One. Through the Guru, I have met Him, O my mother! ||1||
